templates.title: Confirm shipping address
templates.summary: Verify address before ship to avoid loss.

ai.promptHint: Keep under 120 words. No emoji. Human seller tone. Preserve {{tokens}}.

templates.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}},

Quick check before we ship order **{{order_id}}**.

Address on file:
{{address_line}}

Reply **YES** if that's correct, or send the updated address today and we'll use that.

Thanks,
{{seller_signoff}}

templates.title: Cancel before ship
templates.summary: Buyer wants cancel; item not shipped yet.

ai.promptHint: Keep under 120 words. No emoji. Human seller tone. Preserve {{tokens}}.

templates.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}},

Got it — I've cancelled order **{{order_id}}** for **{{item_title}}** before it shipped.

A full refund is on the way. No need to return anything.

Thanks for letting me know early,
{{seller_signoff}}

templates.title: Damaged on arrival
templates.summary: Damage claim path — photos + replacement/refund.

variables.label: Photo request
variables.example: a quick photo of the item and the packaging

ai.promptHint: Keep under 120 words. No emoji. Human seller tone. Preserve {{tokens}}.

templates.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}},

Sorry the item for order **{{order_id}}** arrived damaged.

If you can send {{photo_ask}}, I'll process a replacement or full refund right away.

You shouldn't have to keep a broken item — we'll make this right.

Thanks,
{{seller_signoff}}

templates.title: Shipping delay — honest
templates.summary: Proactive delay notice with new ETA and option to cancel.

ai.promptHint: Own the delay. Offer cancel. No excuses essay.

templates.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}},

Quick update on order **{{order_id}}**.

There’s a short delay ({{reason_short}}). New expected ship/delivery window: **{{new_eta}}**.

If that doesn’t work for you, reply and I’ll cancel + refund right away — no hassle.

Thanks for your patience,
{{seller_signoff}}

templates.title: Feedback concern (calm)
templates.summary: Calm reply when buyer left negative; offer fix first.

variables.label: Fix offer
variables.example: a full refund or a free replacement, your choice

ai.promptHint: Keep under 120 words. No emoji. Human seller tone. Preserve {{tokens}}.

templates.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}},

I saw your note on order **{{order_id}}** and I want to make this right.

I can offer {{offer}}.

If we resolve this, and you're open to updating your feedback afterward, I'd really appreciate it — only if you're satisfied with the fix.

Reply with what you prefer and I'll move today.

Thanks,
{{seller_signoff}}

templates.title: Invoice / receipt
templates.summary: Send simple order receipt text.

ai.promptHint: Keep under 120 words. No emoji. Human seller tone. Preserve {{tokens}}.

templates.title: Out of stock — polite
templates.summary: Buyer OOS reply: apologize, cancel/refund path, optional similar item.

variables.label: Optional similar item note
variables.example: We can point you to a close match if you want.

ai.promptHint: Keep short, human, no corporate fluff. Preserve tokens. Under 120 words.

templates.title: Partial refund offer
templates.summary: Keep item + partial refund compromise.

ai.promptHint: Keep under 120 words. No emoji. Human seller tone. Preserve {{tokens}}.

templates.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}},

Thanks for the note on order **{{order_id}}**.

I can issue a **{{amount}}** partial refund for {{reason_short}} so you can keep the item without a return.

Reply if that works and I'll process it today.

Thanks,
{{seller_signoff}}

templates.title: Full refund issued
templates.summary: Confirm full refund after return or cancellation.

ai.promptHint: Keep under 120 words. No emoji. Human seller tone. Preserve {{tokens}}.

templates.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}},

Your refund for order **{{order_id}}** has been issued for **{{amount}}**.

It usually shows on your original payment method within **{{timeline}}** (banks can take a little longer).

If you don't see it after that window, reply here and I'll help track it.

Thanks,
{{seller_signoff}}

templates.title: Returns how-to
templates.summary: Calm returns instructions with next steps.

variables.label: Next step for buyer
variables.example: Open a return request on eBay and I’ll approve it same day.

ai.promptHint: No blame language. Clear steps only.

templates.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}},

Happy to help with the return on order **{{order_id}}**.

Our return window is **{{return_window}}** from delivery.

Next step:
{{next_step}}

Once we receive the item back in sellable condition, refund issues promptly.

Thanks,
{{seller_signoff}}

templates.title: Shipping update with tracking
templates.summary: Shipped notice with carrier, tracking, and ETA.

ai.promptHint: Keep tracking line exact. No emoji spam. Under 90 words.

templates.title: Thanks + soft feedback ask
templates.summary: Post-delivery thank you. Soft feedback invite, never pushy.

ai.promptHint: Never guilt for feedback. One soft line max.

templates.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}},

Hope **{{item_title}}** arrived in good shape.

If anything’s off, message me first — I’ll make it right.

If you’re happy with it, a quick note on the order helps other buyers (only if you want).

Thanks for shopping with us,
{{seller_signoff}}

templates.title: Wrong item received
templates.summary: Apologize and offer replacement or refund path.

variables.label: Next step
variables.example: I can send the correct item or issue a full refund — reply with your preference.

ai.promptHint: Keep under 120 words. No emoji. Human seller tone. Preserve {{tokens}}.

templates.body:
Hi {{buyer_name}},

I'm sorry — it sounds like order **{{order_id}}** arrived with the wrong item.

That's on us. Here's the next step:
{{next_step}}

Please keep the package as-is until we confirm the path so we can fix this cleanly.

Sorry again,
{{seller_signoff}}

templates.title: Automation Studio → Archive as template
templates.summary: Inspo for Oleg’s studio archive handshake: successful run becomes a shareable automation template in Danish’s library.

ai.promptHint: Show straight-line workflow, not constellation graphs. Matches Automation Recorder V2 UI notes.

imagePrompts: Dark developer tool UI: left recorded steps list, center simple vertical workflow nodes (not fancy AI graph), right TypeScript code panel. Black background, white text, silver dividers, green success dots on completed steps. Button at bottom: Save as template. Product-quality software screenshot feel, 16:9.
Save as template modal: title field, tags chips, Share with team, marketplace eBay, version 1.0.0. Pure black modal, silver border, white primary button.

templates.body:
# Inspo · Studio Archive → shared template

## Ownership
- **Oleg** builds Automation Studio (record → generate → run → archive).
- **Danish** owns the **template library** that receives archived modules + all other packs.

## Handshake end state
When a recording **runs green**, studio one-click:

**Save as template** → writes `kind: "automation-module"` into Danish’s library schema.

## Minimum fields (Danish defines; Oleg exports)
- title
- marketplace
- steps[] (action type + selector summary + human label)
- mutationHistory[] (empty until self-heal)
- sharedWith[]
- version

## Danish does not rebuild studio
Keep a clean import path + preview card for `automation-module`.  
Library UI can show “from Studio” packs once Oleg’s export lands.

templates.title: Template Library shell (product UI)
templates.summary: Full-page inspo for a shared template library inside Syndrax app — black/silver product UI, not AI art.

ai.promptHint: When generating images, enforce colors black white silver green-live amber-warn only. Product-UI mockups only.

imagePrompts: Dark product UI screenshot of a template library. Pure black background #000, white Inter text, thin silver borders. Left sidebar: categories Listing, Messages, Workflows, Automation. Main grid of 6 template cards with title, 3 tags, Ready pill in green, author avatar initials. Top bar: Search templates, New template, AI remix. No neon, no purple, no node graphs, no floating logos. Looks like Vercel dashboard mixed with Ramp. 16:9.

Same app, detail drawer open on right for a listing description template. Shows HTML preview pane, Variables list with {{title}} chips, Share with team toggle, Remix with AI button. Black/white/silver only. Crisp UI mock, not illustration.
Team share modal: checklist of teammates Oleg and Danish, visibility Shared, version 1.0.0, Export JSON. Minimal premium SaaS, pure black surface.

templates.body:
# Inspo · Template Library shell

## Goal
A place inside Syndrax where the team **browses, remixes, and shares** templates:

- Listing description HTML
- Buyer messages
- Workflows / saved automations
- Automation Studio exports (`automation-module`)
- Inspo packs (full improvement visions)

## Layout (product UI)

```
┌ Sidebar ──────────┬ Main ──────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Search            │ [Search templates…]     [AI remix] [New]   │
│ Listing (5)       │ ┌ card ┐ ┌ card ┐ ┌ card ┐                 │
│ Messages (5)      │ │      │ │      │ │      │                 │
│ Workflows (3)     │ └──────┘ └──────┘ └──────┘                 │
│ Automation        │                                            │
│ Inspo             │ Detail drawer → preview + variables + share│
└───────────────────┴────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## States
- **Ready** — green pill
- **Draft** — silver/muted
- **Shared** — white outline
- **Archived** — dimmed

## AI help (later)
1. “Remix this template” → keep structure + tokens, 3 variants  
2. “Generate from brief” → new `template.json` + body  
3. “Inspo from screenshot” → vision → suggested UI improvements  

## Do not
- Rainbow gradients
- Orbiting logos / neural node posters
- Fake metrics walls

## Wire targets (existing product)
- `dashboard.js` Description Builder (todo)
- Message Tool (todo)
- Jobs → Templates / Saved automations (localStorage shell today)
- Automation Recorder V2 Phase 7 Archive
